name: Aurora Apartments
neighborhood: North Bethesda (Pike District) / Rockville postal area
approxRentRange: $2,494-$2,817/mo for 2BR (late 2025/2026 listings; upper outliers to ~$5,670 for premium units)
bathroomsNote: All 2BR floor plans (C1-C5, 997-1,160 sqft) are 2 bed / 2 bath

notes.building: 18-story LEED-certified high-rise built 2015; 341 units; on-site Starbucks, golf simulator, rooftop terrace, dog park, bike storage.
notes.doorman: Concierge confirmed on-site; specific 24-hour staffing not documented. Management office hours posted (Mon/Wed-Fri 9-6, Sat 10-5, Sun 12-5, Tue closed) suggest coverage is not round-the-clock.
notes.pets: Cats and dogs allowed; max 75 lbs each; limit 1 pet per unit; $75/mo pet rent; breed restrictions include pit bulls, German Shepherds, Huskies.
notes.packageRoom: Package receiving confirmed as listed amenity.
notes.unitClimate: Individual heating and AC control per unit confirmed.
notes.wellMaintained: Marketing copy calls it award-winning with pristine grounds. Resident reviews are mixed: some praise attentive staff; others cite elevator-hall lighting out for extended periods and slow maintenance responses. Insufficient independent evidence to confirm or deny.
notes.buildingType: Single rental building under central management (not individually owned condos).
